title: Cleaning Bid Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing cleaning service bids based on labor, materials, equipment, overhead, and profit margin, with built-in waste reduction and quality adjustment factors.

inputs.label: Total Area (sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temizlenebilir toplam taban alanı fit kare cinsinden. Tüm işçilik ve malzeme hesaplamalarının temeli.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte reinigbare Bodenfläche in Quadratfuß. Grundlage für alle Arbeits- und Materialberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale nettoyable en pieds carrés. Base pour tous les calculs de main-d'œuvre et de matériaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total de suelo limpiable en pies cuadrados. Base para todos los cálculos de mano de obra y materiales.

inputs.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
inputs.businessContext: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesisin haftada kaç kez temizlendiği. İşçilik ve sarf malzemesi kullanımını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Reinigungen pro Woche. Beeinflusst Arbeitsaufwand und Verbrauchsmaterialien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fois que l'installation est nettoyée par semaine. Affecte l'utilisation de main-d'œuvre et de consommables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de veces que se limpia la instalación por semana. Afecta el uso de mano de obra y consumibles.

inputs.label: Labor Rate ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temizlik personelinin saatlik ücreti. Temel maaşı içerir, yan yükler hariç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenlohn für Reinigungspersonal. Inklusive Grundgehalt, ohne Nebenkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire du personnel de nettoyage. Inclut le salaire de base, pas les charges.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora del personal de limpieza. Incluye salario base, no cargas sociales.

inputs.label: Labor Burden (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi, sigorta, yan haklar için işçilik ücretine eklenen yüzde. Tipik aralık %15-35.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der zu den Arbeitskosten für Steuern, Versicherungen, Sozialleistungen hinzugerechnet wird. Typischer Bereich 15-35%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage ajouté au taux horaire pour les impôts, assurances, avantages. Plage typique 15-35%.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje añadido a la tarifa de mano de obra por impuestos, seguros, beneficios. Rango típico 15-35%.

inputs.label: Productivity Rate (sq ft/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başı saatte temizlenen ortalama alan. Sektör kıyaslamalarına (ISSA, BSCAI) dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Fläche, die pro Person und Stunde gereinigt wird. Basierend auf Branchenbenchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface moyenne nettoyée par personne par heure. Basé sur les références de l'industrie (ISSA, BSCAI).
businessContext_i18n.es: Área promedio limpiada por persona por hora. Basado en referencias de la industria (ISSA, BSCAI).

inputs.label: Material Cost ($/sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temizlik kimyasalları, kağıt ve sarf malzemelerinin metrekare başına temizlik başına maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Reinigungschemikalien, Papier und Verbrauchsmaterialien pro Quadratmeter pro Reinigung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des produits chimiques de nettoyage, du papier et des consommables par pied carré par nettoyage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de productos químicos de limpieza, papel y consumibles por pie cuadrado por limpieza.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost ($/sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Amorti edilmiş ekipman maliyeti (paspaslar, elektrikli süpürgeler, cilalama makineleri) metrekare başına temizlik başına.
businessContext_i18n.de: Amortisierte Gerätekosten (Mopps, Staubsauger, Bürsten) pro Quadratmeter pro Reinigung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût amorti de l'équipement (serpillières, aspirateurs, lustreuses) par pied carré par nettoyage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo amortizado del equipo (trapeadores, aspiradoras, pulidoras) por pie cuadrado por limpieza.

inputs.label: Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolaylı maliyetler (yönetim, ofis, sigorta) doğrudan maliyetlerin yüzdesi olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Indirekte Kosten (Verwaltung, Büro, Versicherung) als Prozentsatz der direkten Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts indirects (gestion, bureau, assurance) en pourcentage des coûts directs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes indirectos (gestión, oficina, seguros) como porcentaje de los costes directos.

rules.message: Labor rate must be at least federal minimum wage ($7.25).
Productivity rate out of typical range (500-5000 sq ft/hour).
Healthcare quality level requires productivity <= 3000 sq ft/hour for compliance.
Lean methods should reduce waste; consider lowering waste factor to <=10%.

thresholds.message: Bid price seems very low relative to area. Check inputs.
Labor burden above typical maximum (40%). Verify.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
